column1: SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_deliveries
ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)
JOIN olist_order_items_dataset oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
JOIN olist_products_dataset p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
